item.title: 数百 GB、超 20 万份 iPhone 18 Pro 机密文件流出
item.guid: 数百-GB、超-20-万份-iPhone-18-Pro-机密文件流出
item.description:
According to Reuters, the ransomware group World Leaks has uploaded sensitive files related to the iPhone 18 Pro series to the dark web after infiltrating Apple's Indian supplier, Tata Electronics. 据路透社报道，勒索软件组织 World Leaks 入侵苹果印度供应商塔塔电子后，已将涉及 iPhone 18 Pro 系列的敏感文件上传至暗网。

Sources claim that this leak involves hundreds of GBs, totaling over 200,000 files, covering component and supplier lists, drop test photos, and related drawings for the A20 chip and C2 baseband. 有消息称，此次泄露文件体量达数百 GB，共超 20 万份，涵盖零部件与供应商清单、跌落测试照片，以及 A20 芯片和 C2 基带的相关图纸。

Documents obtained by Reuters show that at least 6 files detail the suppliers corresponding to each component of the iPhone 18 Pro, involving main circuit board chips, batteries, and camera modules, collectively covering hundreds of components. 路透社获取的文件显示，至少 6 份文件详细列出了 iPhone 18 Pro 各零部件对应的供应商，涉及主电路板芯片、电池及摄像头组件，合计涵盖数百种零部件。

Multiple documents bear Apple's "Confidential" watermark, with internal codenames consistent with the iPhone 18 Pro product generation. Drop test photos taken earlier this year show a gray slab device being tested at a Tata Electronics factory, which sources say is the iPhone 18 Pro series. 多份文件带有苹果「机密」水印，内部代号与 iPhone 18 Pro 产品世代一致。跌落测试照片拍摄于今年初，显示一台灰色直板设备在塔塔电子工厂接受测试，知情人士称拍摄对象为 iPhone 18 Pro 系列。

In addition to the iPhone 18 Pro, the leaked content also involves design data for older iPhone components, some Tesla component files, and relevant documents from TSMC and Qualcomm. Apple has launched an investigation, while Tata Electronics has restricted employee access to sensitive systems and hired a consulting firm to conduct a forensic audit. 泄露内容除 iPhone 18 Pro 外，还涉及旧款 iPhone 零部件设计资料、特斯拉部分零部件文件，以及台积电和高通的相关文档。目前，苹果已启动调查，塔塔电子则限制员工访问敏感系统，并聘请咨询公司开展取证审计。

item.title: Claude Sonnet 5 正式上线，想把 AI Agent 运行成本打下来
item.guid: Claude-Sonnet-5-正式上线，想把-AI-Agent-运行成本打下来
item.description:
On the 30th local time, Anthropic released its new generation mid-sized model, Claude Sonnet 5, with a core focus on strengthening AI agent capabilities. The company stated that the model's performance in autonomous planning, browser, and terminal tool invocation has reached the level of previous large and expensive models. 当地时间 30 日，Anthropic 发布新一代中型模型 Claude Sonnet 5，核心强化了 AI 智能体能力。官方表示，该模型在自主规划、浏览器及终端工具调用方面的表现，已达到此前大型昂贵模型的水平。

In terms of performance, Sonnet 5 scored 63.2% in programming benchmarks, approaching the top model Opus 4.8, and significantly outperforming its predecessor Sonnet 4.6. 性能方面，Sonnet 5 在编程基准测试中得分 63.2%，接近顶级模型 Opus 4.8，并显著优于前代 Sonnet 4.6。

Early partner feedback indicates that the model can autonomously complete multi-step, cross-platform tasks such as updating Salesforce accounts and sending announcements, and possesses stronger self-checking capabilities. In terms of security, the new model shows improvements in rejecting malicious requests, reducing hallucination rates, and resisting prompt injection. 早期合作伙伴反馈显示，该模型能自主完成更新 Salesforce 账户、发送公告等跨平台多步任务，且具备更强的自我检查能力。安全性上，新模型在拒绝恶意请求、降低幻觉率及抵御提示词注入方面均有提升。

Sonnet 5 is now the default model for both the free and Pro versions. In terms of pricing, the model's initial price on the Claude Platform is $2 per million input tokens and $10 per million output tokens (discounted until August 31st), after which it will be adjusted to $3 and $15 respectively. Sonnet 5 即日起成为免费版与 Pro 版的默认模型。价格方面，模型在 Claude Platform 的初始定价为每百万输入 Token 2 美元，每百万输出 Token 10 美元（优惠至 8 月 31 日），随后将调整为 3 美元和 15 美元。

Anthropic emphasizes that Sonnet 5's goal is to significantly reduce the cost for developers to run AI agents while maintaining high performance. Anthropic 强调，Sonnet 5 的目标是在维持高性能的同时，大幅降低开发者运行 AI 智能体的成本。

🔗 Related reading: After a large-scale account suspension, Claude suddenly released a cheaper new model 🔗 相关阅读： 大规模封号后，Claude 突然发布更便宜的新模型

item.title: SK 海力士正式启动赴美 IPO
item.guid: SK-海力士正式启动赴美-IPO
item.description:
SK Hynix yesterday filed an F-1 registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, officially initiating its U.S. IPO, planning to list on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "SKHY" in the form of American Depositary Shares (ADS). SK 海力士昨日向美国证券交易委员会提交 F-1 招股说明书，正式启动赴美 IPO，计划在纳斯达克上市，股票代码为「SKHY」，发行形式为美国存托股份（ADS）。

The maximum number of new shares issued in this offering is 17,790,000, accounting for approximately 2.50% of the total share capital. Key terms such as the offering price and the ratio of ADS to shares have not yet been determined. The underwriters are BofA Securities, Citi, Goldman Sachs, and JPMorgan Chase. 本次新发股份上限为 17,790,000 股，约占总股本的 2.50%。发行价格及 ADS 对应股份比例等关键条款尚未确定。承销商为美银证券、花旗、高盛及摩根大通。

The prospectus shows that Hynix's revenue in the first quarter of this year was 52.576 trillion Korean Won (approximately $34.5 billion), and net profit was 40.346 trillion Korean Won (approximately $26.5 billion), both significantly increasing from the same period last year. 招股书显示，海力士今年第一季度营收为 52.576 万亿韩元（约合 345 亿美元），净利润为 40.346 万亿韩元（约合 265 亿美元），均较去年同期大幅增长。

Currently, Hynix holds a 56.4% global market share in the HBM market, ranking first; and a 29.1% market share in the overall DRAM market, ranking second. The raised funds will be used for general corporate purposes, including capital expenditures. The specific IPO pricing timetable has not yet been disclosed. 目前，海力士在 HBM 市场全球市占率达 56.4%，排名第一；在整体 DRAM 市场市占率为 29.1%，排名第二。募集资金将用于一般企业用途，包括资本支出。IPO 具体定价时间表尚未披露。

item.title: 字节 CEO 梁汝波发全员信：要求 Leader 实质产出
item.guid: 字节-CEO-梁汝波发全员信：要求-Leader-实质产出
item.description:
According to Phoenix Network Technology, ByteDance CEO Liang Rubo sent an email to all employees on the evening of June 29, announcing an update to the company's leadership principles after four years. 据凤凰网科技报道，字节跳动 CEO 梁汝波于 6 月 29 日晚间向全员发布邮件，宣布时隔四年更新公司领导力原则。

Liang Rubo stated in the email that the company has distilled its operational thinking and principles into management philosophies, primarily comprising four parts: business strategy formulation principles, organizational management, talent strategy, and public affairs. 梁汝波在邮件中表示，公司将运作思考和原则沉淀为管理理念，主要包括业务战略制定原则、组织管理、人才策略和公共事务四个部分。

This updated set of leadership principles consists of 10 items; the previous version was released in 2022. Liang Rubo highlighted several key changes in the email: 此次更新的领导力原则共 10 条，上一版本发布于 2022 年。梁汝波在邮件中重点说明了几项主要变化：

    Added two requirements: "Do things with vision" and "Dare to set high goals," urging managers to step out of daily routines, anchor long-term high-value directions, and avoid relying on resource inertia to maintain the status quo;

    Separated "Maintain a sense of crisis and an external perspective" and "Go deep into the front line" as independent items, clearly requiring management to regularly descend to the front lines of business, products, and users;

    Strengthened the "Context over Control" management philosophy, requiring a reduction in multi-level approvals, repetitive meetings, and ineffective reports, and focusing energy on solving actual business problems.

It is reported that the new leadership principles will be incorporated into managers' promotion and annual performance review standards. Managers who fail to deliver results or are detached from the business front lines will face adjustments to their positions and responsibilities. 据报道，新版领导力原则将纳入管理者的晋升和年度考核标准，无法落地产出、脱离业务一线的管理层将面临岗位权责调整。

item.title: Kimi 新一轮融资投前估值升至 315 亿美元
item.guid: Kimi-新一轮融资投前估值升至-315-亿美元
item.description:
据《科创板日报》消息，月之暗面 Kimi 上一轮按 200 亿美元估值进行的融资近日完成交割，新一轮融资已启动，投前估值升至 315 亿美元，约合 2143.39 亿元人民币。

接近 Kimi 的机构人士称，Kimi 在本轮融资沟通中披露了最新收入数据：6 月中旬 ARR（年度经常性收入）突破 3 亿美元，约合 20.41 亿元人民币。报道还称，Kimi 收入增长主要来自模型迭代带动的开发者使用和 API 收入提升，目前 API 收入占整体 7 成以上，并继续走高。

item.title: 11.98 万元起，最高 99 万元，优必选超仿生人形机器人 U1 系列发布
item.guid: 11.98-万元起，最高-99-万元，优必选超仿生人形机器人-U1-系列发布
item.description:
优必选昨日在深圳举办 2026 年度全球发布会，正式推出旗下消费级品牌「优世界」（UWORLD）首款全尺寸超仿生人形机器人 U1 系列，定位家庭情感陪伴场景。U1 系列分三款：

  • U1 Lite，售价 11.98 万元，为轻量化半身版本；
  • U1 Pro，售价 16.98 万元，相较 Lite 增加完整四肢；
  • U1 Ultra，男款售价 99 万元、女款售价 88 万元，在 Pro 基础上增加自主行动能力与更强算力。

在硬件规格上，男款身高 183 厘米、体重 42 公斤，女款身高 168 厘米、体重 35.2 公斤，均按真人 1:1 比例打造。全系搭载 88 个高自由度运动关节，可实现眨眼、转头、微笑等拟人化微动作。

芯片采用瑞芯微 RK3588，情感大模型基于华为昇腾框架训练，所有交互数据在本地加密存储，不强制上传云端。单次充电续航为 2 至 4 小时。

值得注意的是， 产品仅面向成年用户销售 ，官方明确表示不承担清洁、烹饪等家务功能，定位聚焦情感陪伴。

针对定价，优必选创始人周剑在发布会上回应称，产品「有一定的盈利空间」，并指出仿生机器人制造工艺目前仍处于探索阶段——头颈部含有数十个关节，眉毛、睫毛等仿生细节仍需人工植入。

他表示，未来目标是通过自动化设备实现精细结构的批量化植入，并在规模量产后进一步降低成本与售价。周剑同时称，公司今年的目标是具备 5 万台仿生机器人的规模化生产能力。

🔗 相关阅读： 花99万买个仿生机器人谈恋爱， 贵吗？

item.title: WPS 回应 C 盘占用争议：7 月新版本将支持路径自选与一键清理
item.guid: WPS-回应-C-盘占用争议：7-月新版本将支持路径自选与一键清理
item.description:
据《21世纪经济报道》消息，WPS 昨日针对近期引发热议的系统卡顿及 C 盘占用问题再次作出回应。公司表示，优化后的新版本将于 7 月正式上线，届时用户可前往官网下载更新。

针对用户反映强烈的缓存与备份默认存放 C 盘、占用情况不直观等痛点，新版本将围绕「安装有选择、使用可管理」进行以下重点优化：

  • 安装环节路径自选：在安装界面新增路径选择功能，将安装路径、文件备份路径、云文档存储路径三条路径分开设置，互不绑定；
  • 新增存储管理模块：在设置页集中展示缓存、文件备份、云文档缓存等各类文件的空间占用情况，支持一键清理并反馈清理结果；
  • 自主修改存储路径：支持在使用过程中随时变更存储路径，系统将在变更前自动校验目标盘的空间与权限。

WPS 此前曾解释称，本地保留云文档缓存副本是为了实现多设备同步而无需重复下载，是行业通行做法。但公司承认在产品设计上对用户知情权和选择权的重视程度仍有改进空间，未来将持续优化产品功能。

item.title: 网易 CC 直播 8 月 31 日停止运营
item.guid: 网易-CC-直播-8-月-31-日停止运营
item.description:
网易 CC 直播昨日发布停运公告，称因产品开发运营策略调整，平台将于 2026 年 8 月 31 日 15:00 终止运营。

按照公告，从 6 月 30 日 14:00 起，网易 CC 直播关闭全平台下载入口，停止充值、新用户注册以及新主播、新公会入驻。7 月 31 日 15:00 起，平台将停止直播和开播服务；8 月 31 日 15:00 后，网页、App、服务端和账号数据会停止提供服务。

item.title: 动力电池装车需求今年预计达 888.7 GWh，同比增长 15.8%
item.guid: 动力电池装车需求今年预计达-888.7-GWh，同比增长-15.8%
item.description:
Yesterday, the China Automotive Power Battery Industry Innovation Alliance 2026 Annual Forum was held in Beijing. Ma Xiaoli, Deputy Director of the National Power Battery Innovation Center, disclosed at the forum that, affected by the slowdown in the growth of new energy vehicles, the domestic power battery industry has transitioned from a high-speed growth stage to a "steady growth, structural upgrading" stage, with overall growth rate decreasing compared to 2025. 昨日，中国汽车动力电池产业创新联盟 2026 年度论坛在北京召开。国家动力电池创新中心副主任马小利在论坛上披露，受新能源汽车增量放缓影响，国内动力电池行业已由高速增长阶段转入「稳健增长、结构升级」阶段，整体增速较 2025 年有所下降。

Ma Xiaoli expects that this year, the total domestic power battery installation demand will reach 888.7 GWh, a year-on-year increase of 15.8%. By vehicle type, the installation demand for new energy passenger vehicles is expected to reach 672.7 GWh, a year-on-year increase of 10.8%; the installation demand for new energy commercial vehicles is expected to reach 216.1 GWh, a year-on-year increase of 34.7%, with commercial vehicle growth significantly higher than passenger vehicles. 马小利预计，今年国内动力电池全年装车需求将达 888.7 GWh，同比增长 15.8%。分车型来看，新能源乘用车装车需求预计达 672.7 GWh，同比增长 10.8%；新能源商用车装车需求预计达 216.1 GWh，同比增长 34.7%，商用车增速明显高于乘用车。

item.title: 寒武纪盘中市值突破 1 万亿元，成科创板首只万亿股
item.guid: 寒武纪盘中市值突破-1-万亿元，成科创板首只万亿股
item.description: Cambricon's intraday gains expanded to over 8% yesterday, with its share price reaching 1605.99 yuan, and its total market capitalization exceeding 1 trillion yuan, making it the first stock on the STAR Market to reach the trillion-yuan level. As of the 15:00 closing, Cambricon's share price was 1595.55 yuan, with a daily increase of 7.66% and a total market capitalization of approximately 916 billion yuan. 寒武纪昨日盘中涨幅一度扩大至逾 8%，股价报 1605.99 元，总市值突破 1 万亿元，成为科创板首只市值达到万亿级别的股票。截至 15:00 收盘，寒武纪股价报 1595.55 元，当日涨幅为 7.66%、总市值约 9160 亿元。

item.title: 立讯精密香港上市最高募资 31 亿美元
item.guid: 立讯精密香港上市最高募资-31-亿美元
item.description:
Bloomberg reported that Apple supplier Luxshare Precision has begun accepting subscriptions from Hong Kong listing investors, with a maximum fundraising amount of up to HK$24.3 billion, or approximately US$3.1 billion. If the issuance is completed at this scale, it will become Hong Kong's largest new stock listing this year. 彭博社报道称，苹果供应商立讯精密已开始接受香港上市投资者认购，最高募资额可达 243 亿港元，约合 31 亿美元。若按该规模完成发行，这将成为香港今年以来最大规模的新股上市。

Listing documents show that Luxshare Precision plans to offer 383.5 million shares, with a maximum offering price of HK$63.28 per share. This price represents an approximately 16% discount compared to its Shenzhen A-share closing price of RMB 65.30 on Monday. 上市文件显示，立讯精密此次拟发售 3.835 亿股，最高发行价为每股 63.28 港元。该价格较其深圳 A 股周一 65.30 元人民币收盘价有约 16% 折让。

Luxshare Precision is an important assembler for Apple products such as AirPods, and is also involved in businesses like connectors, precision manufacturing for consumer electronics, and automotive electronics. 立讯精密是苹果 AirPods 等产品的重要组装商，也参与连接器、消费电子精密制造和汽车电子等业务。

item.title: 💡 研究：把 AI 智能体叫做「员工」，会让人类犯更多错误
item.guid: 💡-研究：把-AI-智能体叫做「员工」，会让人类犯更多错误
item.description:
According to MIT Technology Review, the marketing approach of packaging AI agents as "digital employees" may be systematically undermining human employees' judgment and sense of responsibility. 据 MIT Technology Review 报道，将 AI 智能体包装成「数字员工」的营销方式，可能正在系统性地削弱人类员工的判断力与责任感。

Research by Emma Wiles, a researcher at Boston University's Questrom School of Business, found that when AI tools were defined as "AI employees" rather than ordinary chatbots, the ability of managers participating in the experiment to identify errors decreased by 18%, and 44% were more inclined to report problematic results to superiors rather than correcting them themselves. 波士顿大学商学院研究员 Emma Wiles 的研究发现，当 AI 工具被定义为「AI 员工」而非普通聊天机器人时，参与实验的管理者识别错误的能力下降了 18%，且有 44% 更倾向于将有问题的结果上报给上级，而非自行纠正。

Among the 1,261 managers participating in the study, nearly one-third stated that their companies classified AI agents as "employees," and even 23% of companies included them in their organizational charts. 参与研究的 1,261 名管理者中，已有近三分之一表示其所在公司将 AI 智能体定性为「员工」，甚至有 23% 的公司将其列入组织架构图。

MIT economist and 2024 Nobel laureate Daron Acemoglu also stated that current AI agents "are being marketed as tools to replace humans, which is a dead end," and believes they should be optimized as tools to augment human capabilities, not replacements. MIT 经济学家、2024 年诺贝尔奖得主 Daron Acemoglu 也表示，当前 AI 智能体「被当作替代人类的工具来营销，这是一条走不通的路」，并认为其应当被优化为增强人类能力的工具，而非替代品。

MIT Technology Review pointed out that the "digital employee" narrative is essentially a branding exercise that does not enhance the tool's capabilities but makes surrounding human employees perform worse. As AI agents accelerate their penetration into critical areas such as healthcare, education, and government affairs, how to avoid a responsibility vacuum in deployment has become a systemic risk that cannot be ignored. MIT Technology Review 指出，「数字员工」的叙事本质上是一种品牌包装，并不能提升工具本身的能力，却会让周围的人类员工表现更差。随着 AI 智能体加速渗透医疗、教育、政务等关键领域，如何在部署方式上避免责任真空，已成为不可忽视的系统性风险。

item.title: 4999 元起，红魔游戏平板 5 Pro 正式发布
item.guid: 4999-元起，红魔游戏平板-5-Pro-正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, RedMagic officially launched the Gaming Tablet 5 Pro, offering three storage configurations from 12GB + 256GB to 16GB + 1TB, with a starting price of 4999 yuan for the first sale. 昨天，红魔正式推出游戏平板 5 Pro，提供 12GB + 256GB 至 16GB + 1TB 三个存储规格，首销售价 4999 元起。

  • Equipped with the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Ultimate Edition; 搭载第五代骁龙 8 至尊版；
  • 9.06-inch 2400×1504, 185Hz OLED, featuring X10 luminous material for the first time, with a local peak brightness of 1600nit and a global peak brightness of 1100nit; 9.06 英寸 2400×1504、185Hz OLED，首发 X10 发光材料，局部峰值亮度 1600nit，全局峰值亮度 1100nit；
  • Equipped with the Synaptics S3930 touch chip, supporting a native multi-finger touch sampling rate of 300Hz and an instantaneous touch reporting rate of 2000Hz; 搭载新思 S3930 触控芯片，多指原生触控采样率 300Hz，瞬时报点率 2000Hz；
  • Active liquid cooling + liquid metal 3.0 + extra-large VC vapor chamber, with coolant using the same fluorinated liquid as AI servers; 主动水冷 + 液态金属 3.0 + 超大 VC 均热板，冷却液采用 AI 服务器同款氟化液；
  • Built-in 8300mAh battery, both Type-C ports support 80W fast charging and bypass charging, comes standard with a 100W charger; 内置 8300mAh 电池，双 Type-C 口均支持 80W 快充及旁路充电，标配 100W 充电器；
  • Transparent back panel with 11 built-in RGB light beads, flat design, body dimensions 207.1×134.2×6.9mm, weighing 363g. 透明背板内置 11 颗 RGB 灯珠，纯平设计，机身尺寸 207.1×134.2×6.9mm，重 363g。

In terms of gaming ecosystem, the RedMagic Gaming Tablet 5 Pro is the first tablet to feature Steam Direct Connect mode, allowing users to scan a QR code to log into their Steam account and directly download and run PC games on the tablet, with account and save data interoperability. 游戏生态上，红魔游戏平板 5 Pro 为平板品类首发 Steam 直连模式，用户扫码登录 Steam 账号后可直接在平板端下载并运行 PC 游戏，账号与存档互通。

item.title: 9.98 万元起，HORWIN 号外首款 400V 高压超级电摩正式交付
item.guid: 9.98-万元起，HORWIN-号外首款-400V-高压超级电摩正式交付
item.description:
HORWIN Haowai announced yesterday that its super electric motorcycle SENMENTI ONE has officially begun deliveries, with a starting price of 99,800 yuan, available in Haowai Orange, Alien Purple, and Kunling Black color options. HORWIN 号外昨日宣布，旗下超级电摩 SENMENTI ONE 正式开始交付，售价 9.98 万元起，提供号外橙、异能紫、坤灵黑三种配色。

The SENMENTI ONE is equipped with HORWIN's self-developed global first 400V automotive-grade IM integrated power platform, achieving 0-100 km/h acceleration in 3.3 seconds and a top speed of 200 km/h. Safety features include Bosch ABS, ETCS electronic throttle control system, and KYB suspension. SENMENTI ONE 搭载 HORWIN 自研的全球首款 400V 全车规 IM 一体化动力平台，零百加速 3.3 秒，最高时速 200 km/h。安全配置包括博世 ABS、ETCS 电子节气门控制系统以及 KYB 减震。

Regarding range and charging, the SENMENTI ONE is equipped with a 16.9 kWh ternary lithium battery, with an official claimed urban comprehensive range of 300 kilometers. It supports automotive DC fast charging protocols, allowing it to travel 100 kilometers after 10 minutes of charging. The entire vehicle also supports 3 kW external power discharge. 续航与充电方面，SENMENTI ONE 搭载 16.9 kWh 三元锂电池，官方标称城市综合续航 300 公里，并支持汽车直流快充协议，充电 10 分钟可行驶 100 公里，整车还支持 3 kW 对外放电。

In terms of intelligence, the vehicle is equipped with HORWIN OS+ multi-modal interactive system, supporting mobile NFC unlock, OTA upgrades, and offering 4 riding modes and over 2000 custom combination settings. 智能化方面，车辆搭载 HORWIN OS+ 多模态交互系统，支持手机 NFC 解锁、OTA 升级，提供 4 种骑行模式与超过 2000 种自定义组合设置。

item.title: 华为开源 920 亿参数 openPangu-2.0-Flash
item.guid: 华为开源-920-亿参数-openPangu-2.0-Flash
item.description:
Huawei officially announced yesterday the open-sourcing of the Pangu openPangu-2.0-Flash model, with a parameter scale of 92 billion (92B). It adopts a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, with actual activated parameters of 6 billion, supporting an ultra-long context of 512K. 华为昨日正式宣布开源盘古 openPangu-2.0-Flash 模型，参数规模达 920 亿（92B），采用混合专家（MoE）架构，实际激活参数为 60 亿，支持 512K 超长上下文。

According to Huawei's announced open-source plan, the weights and basic inference code for the more powerful openPangu-2.0-Pro model will be launched in July; other open-source components will be released successively in the second half of this year. 根据华为公布的开源计划，性能更强的 openPangu-2.0-Pro 模型权重及基础推理代码将于 7 月上线；其余更多开源组件将于今年下半年陆续发布。

item.title: 美团 LongCat 开源 VitaBench 2.0，评测智能体长期用户建模能力
item.guid: 美团-LongCat-开源-VitaBench-2.0，评测智能体长期用户建模能力
item.description:
Meituan's technical team has released and open-sourced the agent evaluation benchmark VitaBench 2.0, designed for real-life scenarios and long-term dynamic user modeling, used to evaluate the personalization and proactiveness of large language models in long-term interactions. 美团技术团队发布并开源智能体评测基准 VitaBench 2.0，面向真实生活场景、长期动态用户建模，用于评估大语言模型在长期互动中的个性化和主动性。

VitaBench 2.0 includes 56 simulated users, 819 complex tasks, over 2000 dynamic preferences, and 66 executable tools. Each user averages 2093 interaction events with an average time span of 1580 days. The system exposes history to the Agent along a timeline to test the model's ability to continuously extract, update, and utilize user preferences. VitaBench 2.0 包含 56 名拟真用户、819 个复杂任务、超过 2000 个动态偏好和 66 个可执行工具。每位用户平均包含 2093 个交互事件，平均时间跨度 1580 天，系统按时间线向 Agent 暴露历史，用来测试模型持续提取、更新并使用用户偏好的能力。

The Meituan team stated that experiments show even in modes where all historical records are visible, the strongest model's average score barely exceeded 0.5; after integrating Agentic Memory or RAG Memory, most models performed worse than directly using the full historical record. 美团团队称，实验显示即使在能看到全部历史记录的模式下，最强模型平均分也刚过 0.5；接入 Agentic Memory 或 RAG Memory 后，多数模型表现低于直接使用全历史记录。

💻 GitHub: github.com/meituan-longcat/vitabench-2.0 💻 GitHub： github.com/meituan-longcat/vitabench-2.0

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/datasets/meituan-longcat/VitaBench-2.0 🤗 Hugging Face： huggingface.co/datasets/meituan-longcat/VitaBench-2.0

item.title: Cursor iOS 应用进入公测，移动端可启动云端 Agent
item.guid: Cursor-iOS-应用进入公测，移动端可启动云端-Agent
item.description:
According to an official community announcement from Cursor, Cursor for iOS has entered public beta for all paid plans. Users can launch always-on cloud agents from their iPhone or remotely control agents running on their computer. Cursor 官方社区公告显示，Cursor for iOS 已面向所有付费计划进入 public beta。用户可以从 iPhone 启动 always-on cloud agents，也可以远程控制在电脑上运行的 Agent。

The official statement also indicates that mobile users of Composer 2.5 can enjoy a 75% discount before July 5, 2026. 官方同时表示，移动端使用 Composer 2.5 可在 2026 年 7 月 5 日前享受 75% 折扣。

item.title: Base44 推出自研模型 Base1，想降低对通用大模型的依赖
item.guid: Base44-推出自研模型-Base1，想降低对通用大模型的依赖
item.description:
TechCrunch reports that Base44, the vibe coding platform acquired by Wix last year for $80 million, is launching its self-developed AI model to users, supporting natural language application creation. TechCrunch 报道，Wix 去年以 8000 万美元收购的 vibe coding 平台 Base44 正在向用户推出自研 AI 模型，用于支持自然语言创建应用。

Maor Shlomo, founder of Base44, stated that incorporating model training and ownership into their own technology stack allows for more optimizations in latency, cost, and efficiency. The company claims that its first-generation model, Base1, was trained using datasets generated from tens of millions of real user interactions on the platform, and subsequent data will continue to grow with platform usage. Base44 创始人 Maor Shlomo 表示，把模型训练和所有权纳入自家技术栈，可以在延迟、成本和效率上做更多优化。公司称第一代模型 Base1 使用平台上数千万次真实用户交互生成的数据集训练，后续数据会随着平台使用继续增长。

item.title: Nike 以「7-Eleven」和「罗森」为灵感推出 Air Max 95 限定配色
item.guid: Nike-以「7-Eleven」和「罗森」为灵感推出-Air-Max-95-限定配色
item.description:
According to NOWRE, Nike has launched the Air Max 95 Big Bubble QS 2 'CONVINI PACK' series, inspired by Japanese convenience store culture, featuring two colorways. 据 NOWRE 报道，Nike 以日本便利店文化为灵感，推出 Air Max 95 Big Bubble QS 2「CONVINI PACK」系列，共两款配色。

One of the designs is inspired by 7-Eleven, using the brand's iconic green and orange to outline the shoe's layers, paired with earthy suede material for a vintage feel. The other design centers on Lawson's blue and white color scheme, complemented by red accents, replicating the visual identity system of that convenience store chain. 其中一款以 7-Eleven 为灵感，采用品牌标志性的绿色与橙色勾勒鞋身层次，搭配大地色麂皮材质，呈现复古质感；另一款以 Lawson 的蓝白配色为主轴，辅以红色细节点缀，还原该便利店连锁品牌的视觉识别系统。

The series is currently available for lottery sale at atmos Japan stores, priced at 25,520 JPY (approximately 1,064 RMB). 系列目前已于 atmos 日本门店开启抽签发售，售价为 25520 日元（约合 1064 元人民币）。

item.title: 欧莱雅推出 15 美元 NYX 香氛系列，面向 Z 世代人群
item.guid: 欧莱雅推出-15-美元-NYX-香氛系列，面向-Z-世代人群
item.description:
According to Reuters, L'Oréal announced yesterday the launch of a fragrance line for its makeup brand NYX Professional Makeup, entering the mass fragrance market with a price point of $15 (approx. 80 ml), targeting Gen Z consumers. 据路透社报道，欧莱雅昨日宣布推出旗下彩妆品牌 NYX Professional Makeup 的香氛系列，以 15 美元（约 80 毫升）的定价切入大众香水市场，目标人群为 Z 世代消费者。

This marks the first foray into the fragrance category for L'Oréal's Consumer Products Division. Fabrice Megarbane, head of the division, characterized this launch as L'Oréal's initial attempt to enter the perfume market in a 'more affordable' and 'more interesting' way. 这是欧莱雅消费品部门首次涉足香氛品类。该部门负责人 Fabrice Megarbane 将此次发布定性为欧莱雅以「更平价」「更有趣」方式进入香水市场的初次尝试。

item.title: 雷弗恩新片《她个人的地狱》发布海报，7 月 24 日北美上映
item.guid: 雷弗恩新片《她个人的地狱》发布海报，7-月-24-日北美上映
item.description:
Danish director Nicolas Winding Refn's new film 'Her Personal Hell' released a new promotional poster yesterday, featuring a mysterious male killer in a leather jacket. Meanwhile, the film's team revealed that a new trailer will also be released soon, and the film is scheduled for official release in North America on July 24. 丹麦导演尼古拉斯·温丁·雷弗恩执导的新片《她个人的地狱》昨日发布新版宣传海报，画面中出现一名身着皮衣的神秘男性杀手形象。与此同时，影片方面透露新版预告也将于近期发布，影片计划于 7 月 24 日在北美正式公映。

The film is set in a futuristic city, where a mysterious mist covers the entire city and releases deadly entities. A young woman, deeply traumatized, embarks on a journey to find her father, and her fate intertwines with an American soldier trying to save his daughter from danger. 影片设定于一座未来感十足的都市，神秘迷雾笼罩全城并释放出致命实体，一名内心饱受创伤的年轻女性踏上寻父旅途，与一名试图救女于危难之中的美国士兵命运交织。

item.title: 《请以你的名字呼唤我》作者新剧确认女主，维坎德饰演泰勒-约翰逊的恋人
item.guid: 《请以你的名字呼唤我》作者新剧确认女主，维坎德饰演泰勒-约翰逊的恋人
item.description:
According to Variety, Oscar-winning actress Alicia Vikander has been confirmed to join the Netflix limited series "Enigma Variations," co-starring with Aaron Taylor-Johnson. 据 Variety 报道，奥斯卡获奖女演员艾丽西亚·维坎德（Alicia Vikander）已确认加盟 Netflix 限定剧集《Enigma Variations》，与亚伦·泰勒-约翰逊（Aaron Taylor-Johnson）搭档出演。

The series is adapted from the novel of the same name by author André Aciman — Aciman is the original author of "Call Me By Your Name." Taylor-Johnson plays the male lead, Paul, a man shaped and destroyed by multiple lovers over a decade of emotional experiences; Vikander plays one of his lovers, Claire, who is Paul's wife in the original novel. This also marks their reunion since "Anna Karenina" in 2012. 该剧改编自作家安德烈·艾席蒙（André Aciman）的同名小说——艾席蒙即《请以你的名字呼唤我》原著作者。泰勒-约翰逊饰演男主角保罗，一个在跨越十年的情感经历中被多位恋人塑造与毁灭的男人；维坎德饰演其中一位恋人 Claire，在原著中是保罗的妻子。这也是两人自 2012 年《安娜·卡列尼娜》后再度合作。

The official synopsis positions the series as "a profound portrayal of masculinity, sexuality, and contemporary love," stating that it will explore a central question: In a world where choices are ubiquitous, can we recognize true love when it appears? 官方剧情简介将该剧定位为「对男性气概、性和当代爱情的深刻描绘」，并称其将探讨一个核心命题：在选择无处不在的世界里，当真正的爱出现，我们是否能够察觉。
